title: Vanta Engine

images.title: Portfolio Website Home Page
images.description: The home page is rendered fully using Vanta Engine.

images.title: Pirate Ship Test Scene
images.description: This is my test scene which I use to test new features I am adding to the engine.

images.title: End Developer Code
images.description: Vanta Engine scene objects/nodes can be programmed with Lua and use a web assembly Lua runtime called Wasmoon to run in the browser.

links.title: Iris Shader Language GitHub
links.description: This is the work in progress domain specific shader language being created for the Vanta Engine.

nav_description: The Vanta 3D engine is a 3D engine designed with a portability first mindset. The first backend for Vanta is WebGL2 based allowing for great cross platform support.
